dublinCore.dc:title: 119 HR 7098 IH: Homeland Threat Response Act
dublinCore.dc:rights: Pursuant to Title 17 Section 105 of the United States Code, this file is not subject to copyright protection and is in the public domain.

action.action-desc: Mr. Tony Gonzales of Texas introduced the following bill; which was referred to the Committee on the Judiciary

form.official-title: To amend the Homeland Security Act of 2002 to authorize the deployment and assistance of CBP relating to investigations of certain violent acts, shootings, and mass killings, and for other purposes.

section.text: This Act may be cited as the Homeland Threat Response Act.

section.header: Deployment and assistance of CBP relating to investigations of certain violent acts, shootings, and mass killings
section.text: Paragraph (1) of section 875(d) of the Homeland Security Act of 2002 (6 U.S.C. 455(d)) is amended—

paragraph.text: by striking or United States Immigration and Customs Enforcement and inserting , U.S. Immigration and Customs Enforcement, or U.S. Customs and Border Protection; and
inserting response, threat mitigation, resolution, and before investigation.
